name: rldyour-orchestrator
description: Оркестратор cmux на macOS: терминал-оркестратор делегирует worker-терминалам. EN: cmux orchestrator.

interface.shortDescription: Оркестратор cmux macOS. EN: cmux orchestrator
interface.longDescription: Режим оркестратора cmux на macOS для Codex: один user-facing терминал-оркестратор делегирует задачи worker-терминалам через cmux send/read-screen/events и собирает JSON-отчёты с обязательным notify-сигналом завершения. EN: This plugin packages the macOS-only cmux orchestrator and worker role skills. The orchestrator role activates only when the user explicitly declares it during ry-init; sessions without the plugin or without the declaration always run in standard mode, so nothing breaks when the plugin is absent. Worker terminals stay machine-identified through launcher and workspace-layout environment variables because worker scope restrictions are enforced by the rldyour-flow Stop lifecycle state scripts. The plugin is installed only on macOS because cmux (manaflow-ai/cmux) is a macOS application; Linux, WSL, and Windows system installs skip it entirely.
capabilities: Worker task delegation with per-task scope
Worker JSON reports with notify completion signal
defaultPrompt: Используй $cmux-orchestrator: делегируй worker задачи и собери отчеты. EN: orchestrate cmux workers.
Используй $cmux-worker: выполни scoped task и верни JSON report. EN: run a scoped worker task.
